creator: dim@express.net.ua
text:
My central router crashes every day, sometimes it is several times per day.
Hwen it crashes it writes something like "Memory page write error"
It is not hrdware problem, I tried it on multiple hardware.
Hardware:
motherboard ASUS CUBX
Memory 128 ECC ram
CPU PIII 650
2 Intel PRO Ethernet adapters
2 Lucent WaveLANs

Soft:
4.2-STABLE
gated
mrtg
snmpd
apache
ipfw
dummynet
sendmail

How-To-Repeat: It crashes at day time when few megabits is going through it, at night traffic is much smaler & it have no crashes.
